title: Experimental Design Path
description: Build fluency in Experimental Design inside Statistical Methods by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Eppo experiments for ML
steps.summary: Eppo experiments for ML belongs to the Statistical Methods area of AI/ML, within Experimental Design. It sits inside Statistical Methods / Experimental Design. Start after ML Systems.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Design of Experiments (DOE)
steps.summary: Design of Experiments (DOE) belongs to the Statistical Methods area of AI/ML, within Experimental Design. It sits inside Statistical Methods / Experimental Design. Compare it with Eppo experiments for ML and GrowthBook experiments.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: GrowthBook experiments
steps.summary: GrowthBook experiments belongs to the Statistical Methods area of AI/ML, within Experimental Design. It sits inside Statistical Methods / Experimental Design. Compare it with Eppo experiments for ML and Design of Experiments (DOE).
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
